svg.text: LANGUAGE SERIES · עִבְרִית (IVRIT) · READ RIGHT TO LEFT ←
5 letters change form at word-end (sofit): ך ם ן ף ץ · extended values: 500 · 600 · 700 · 800 · 900
Every Hebrew letter is also a number. Every word has a numerical value. Letters are added to make any number.
זה נעשה עבורך, בחופשיות. כל מה שבפנים שלך.
Zeh na'asa avurkha, be'chofshiyut. Kol mah shebifnim shelkha.
"This was made for you, freely. Everything inside is yours."
CC BY-SA 4.0 · PLATE 10 OF [N] · BURIED: [YEAR] · GPS: [LATITUDE, LONGITUDE] · LANDMARK: [DESCRIPTION]
THIS WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO CARED ABOUT THE FUTURE.
USE IT TOGETHER · BUILD SOMETHING BETTER · MAKE MORE CAPSULES FOR OTHERS
